```{=html}
<div style="width:88%;margin:0 auto;text-align:center;">

 <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.18em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.3em;">practice 01</div>
 <div style="font-size:1.4em;font-weight:700;line-height:1;margin-bottom:0.9em;letter-spacing:-0.01em;">
  <span style="color:#2C8475;">Separate</span> generation <span style="color:#9B8EA0;font-weight:400;">from</span> <span style="color:#C4881A;">evaluation</span>.
 </div>

 <div style="display:flex;justify-content:center;align-items:center;gap:0.9em;margin-bottom:1em;">

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border:2px solid #C4881A;border-radius:14px;padding:0.7em 0.95em;text-align:center;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(196,136,26,0.15);min-width:8em;">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#C4881A;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.25em;">agent A</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.7em;font-weight:700;color:#7A5410;">Generator</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;line-height:1.4;margin-top:0.3em;">writes code,<br>exits</div>
  </div>

  <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:0.2em;">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;">REVIEW.md</div>
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;color:#5654A2;font-size:1em;font-weight:700;">→</div>
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;">file handoff</div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border:2px solid #2C8475;border-radius:14px;padding:0.7em 0.95em;text-align:center;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(44,132,117,0.15);min-width:8em;">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#3DA18A;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.25em;">agent B</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.7em;font-weight:700;color:#1F5E54;">Evaluator</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;line-height:1.4;margin-top:0.3em;">fresh context,<br>skeptical</div>
  </div>

 </div>

 <div style="background:#FCEEEC;border-left:4px solid #D45F47;border-radius:0 10px 10px 0;padding:0.55em 0.95em;font-size:0.62em;color:#7A2418;text-align:left;font-style:italic;">
  Never ask Claude to evaluate output Claude just produced. <strong style="font-style:normal;">Single biggest quality lever.</strong>
 </div>

</div>
```
